author: gb9t
content: Iteration 22: intel/ixgbe.md committed (0daa9e0, 224 lines). Intel 10/25G NIC family — 82598/82599/X540/X550/E610 silicon spans 16 years. Huge installed base (every datacenter pre-2020, every BMC OOB network, financial trading). ~48K LOC. Full feature stack: PF/SR-IOV-VF + DCB+FCoE + IPsec inline + PTP + AF_XDP zerocopy + XDP_DRV. Rust translation: per-silicon IxgbeSilicon trait closes cross-silicon-bug class. Grsec: PF↔VF mailbox as primary SR-IOV-escape surface — per-opcode allowlist + VF spoof-check HW-enforced + IPsec key kfree_sensitive + FCoE DDP per-XID scoping. 22 docs / ~1.49M LOC. Next iteration: drivers/net/ethernet/intel/i40e (Intel 40G XL710 — second-largest installed-base Intel server NIC).
